method.coefficient_domain: exact rationals derived from serialized numeric values
method.bipartitions: all unordered nonempty axis bipartitions; axis0 fixes orientation
method.factorization: exact rank decomposition M=C*F with serialized-dtype reconstruction check
method.replacement: one independent unused ASCII latent label per initializer occurrence in each Einsum
method.latent_label_alphabet: a-zA-Z; audit micrographs confirm digits, punctuation, and Unicode are rejected by ONNX full shape inference and ORT 1.24
method.rank1_policy: record only; lane270 overlap excluded from this lane

candidate_gate.skip_reason: All exact rank-R>=2 parameter-saving decompositions fail the independent-latent label budget before a candidate graph can be formed.
